tasks.label: build (debug)
tasks.command: (if not exist build\debug mkdir build\debug) && (if not exist build\glad.obj cl /nologo /w /MD /O2 /Ithird_party\glad\include /c third_party\glad\src\glad.c /Fobuild\glad.obj) && cl /nologo /MP /std:c++20 /EHsc /permissive- /W4 /Zi /FS /Od /MD /DNOMINMAX /Isrc /external:I third_party /external:I third_party\glad\include /external:I third_party\glfw\include /external:I third_party\stb /external:W0 src\*.cpp src\app\*.cpp src\core\*.cpp src\gl\*.cpp src\input\*.cpp src\player\*.cpp src\render\*.cpp src\world\*.cpp build\glad.obj /Fobuild\debug\ /Fdbuild\debug\claudecraft.pdb /Febuild\debug\claudecraft.exe /link /LIBPATH:third_party\glfw\lib glfw3.lib opengl32.lib gdi32.lib user32.lib shell32.lib

tasks.label: build (release)
tasks.command: (if not exist build\release mkdir build\release) && (if not exist build\glad.obj cl /nologo /w /MD /O2 /Ithird_party\glad\include /c third_party\glad\src\glad.c /Fobuild\glad.obj) && cl /nologo /MP /std:c++20 /EHsc /permissive- /W4 /O2 /DNDEBUG /MD /DNOMINMAX /Isrc /external:I third_party /external:I third_party\glad\include /external:I third_party\glfw\include /external:I third_party\stb /external:W0 src\*.cpp src\app\*.cpp src\core\*.cpp src\gl\*.cpp src\input\*.cpp src\player\*.cpp src\render\*.cpp src\world\*.cpp build\glad.obj /Fobuild\release\ /Febuild\release\claudecraft.exe /link /LIBPATH:third_party\glfw\lib glfw3.lib opengl32.lib gdi32.lib user32.lib shell32.lib
